notes.hypothesis: A further full wipe/air-dry pass may show whether s1 can reach the same dry-air region as the other probes, or whether its lower reading is a persistent channel/probe offset.
notes.method: All four probes were wiped/air-dried again. A 60 s capture at 0.5 s cadence was recorded. Earlier nearby attempts without manifests appear to have been aborted/invalid-label attempts and are not treated as separate evidence.
notes.findings: Medians were s1 3120, s2 3120, s3 3123, s4 3099 raw ADC. s1 reached the same dry-air region as s2/s3 in this valid capture. Ranges remained narrow.
notes.conclusion: s1's earlier lower dry reading was not a fixed sensor limitation; it could reach the high dry-air region after additional drying/wiping. This supports using the later full-wipe runs when estimating dry endpoints.
